pages.text: $(bold)Nano Dash$() is an active ability that channels your suit's movement augmentation into a rapid directional burst. This short-range teleport-like movement allows tactical repositioning, evasion, and offensive positioning.$(br2)Activation: $(bold)Crouch while sprinting and release$()$(br)Cost: 1 $(l:u_heroes:life_essence)Life Essence$(/l) per dash

$(bold)Movement Profile:$()$(br)- $(bold)Distance:$() Approximately 15 blocks per dash$(br)- $(bold)Direction:$() Forward, diagonal, or lateral based on movement input$(br)- $(bold)Speed:$() Instantaneous repositioning with brief cooldown$(br)- $(bold)No Knockback:$() You maintain momentum control

$(bold)Combat Applications:$()$(br)- Quick evasion from incoming attacks$(br)- Close-quarters repositioning against melee enemies$(br)- Escape from hazardous terrain$(br)- Tactical approach angles for ranged weapons$(br)- Breaking pursuit from enemy swarms

$(bold)Advanced Tactics:$()$(br)The dash has a brief cooldown between uses. Chaining dashes requires precise essence management and timing.$(br2)Smart use: Dash to high ground, dash through narrow gaps, dash away from danger. Wasteful use: Dashing randomly burns essence without strategic benefit.$(br2)Master this ability. It may save your life.
